title: More Pumpkins
description: Adds new carved pumpkins to your world!
body:
This mod adds 200+ new carved pumpkins to your world that also includes their jack o' lantern variant! It also adds a new type of jack o' lantern called the Soul Jack O' Lantern which is like the regular jack o' lantern but with a blue glow.

## Loaders

- [Bedrock](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft-bedrock/addons/more-pumpkins)
- **Fabric**

## Obtain

1. Use shears to make a regular Carved Pumpkin.
2. Now pick-up the Carved Pumpkin by breaking it with any tool.
3. Finally place the Carved Pumpkin inside a Stonecutter to get all carved variants.

To get a Jack o' Lantern simply place the Carved Pumpkin in the crafting table with a Torch or Soul Torch under it.

## Block List

The following are available in Carved, Jack o'Lantern, and Soul Jack o'Lantern variants.

- Creeper
- Flower
- Ghast
- Globe
- Observer
- Skeleton
- Snout

## FAQ

### Can I add this to my mod pack?

Sure, as long as you give proper credit and follow the license.

### Are you going to downgrade to older versions (ie; 1.15, 1.12, 1.8)?

I will if there is enough demand for a certain version and I have time to.

## Maven

```gradle
dependencies {
    modImplementation "maven.modrinth:more-pumpkin:fabric-${project.morepumpkin_version}"
}
```
[More Information](https://docs.modrinth.com/docs/tutorials/maven/)
